˚　　　　✦　　　.　　. 　 ˚　.　　　　　 . ✦　　　 　

I tried to make it as accurate as possible!! All information was taken from the game and data provided by the creator of the game!! Data was very scattered and I had to put it all together with duct tape and bubble gum lol. (It may look a bit messy but I tried to make it as tidy as possible since they were loose ideas). But it works very well! (Believe me) I will be updating Danya as more info comes out!!!

Also English is not my first language so there will be some grammar mistakes! Plss Tell me if you find any <3
